name: Robert Coleman
bio: Robert Coleman serves as the Mayor of Hemphill, the county seat of Sabine County. Hemphill is a small East Texas community near Toledo Bend Reservoir and the Sabine National Forest, making it a popular destination for fishing and outdoor recreation. The mayor works with the city council to support tourism and maintain city services.
campaignPromises: Promote Toledo Bend Reservoir and outdoor recreation
Improve city infrastructure and water systems
Support local businesses and tourism industry
Maintain public safety and emergency services
